cosmos.title: "My 1st Year as a Software Engineer: Lessons Learned"
cosmos.excerpt: "Reflections on my first year as a software engineer - embracing challenges, asking for help, and the importance of kindness."

codex.title: Fail Fast, Learn Faster - Instinct, on Purpose
codex.excerpt: This guide shows how to run safe-to-fail experiments in life plus at work. Build a personal system where every attempt either moves you forward or pays you back in information.
